description: CrediLab badge definitions with inline SVG icons for cross-platform integration (web + mobile). Each badge includes a complete SVG string that can be rendered directly. Colours use hex values for native compatibility.

badges.title: First Blood
badges.description: Completed your very first coding challenge. Every journey begins with a single step.
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M25 8l6-3v40h8v4H21v-4h8V13l-6 3-2-4z" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M44 4c0 0-7 9-7 14a7 7 0 0014 0c0-5-7-14-7-14z" opacity="0.85"/><ellipse cx="42" cy="15" rx="2" ry="3" opacity="0.25" fill="white"/><line x1="10" y1="56" x2="54" y2="56" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="18" cy="56" r="3"/><circle cx="32" cy="56" r="2.5"/><circle cx="46" cy="56" r="3"/><line x1="18" y1="56" x2="32" y2="56" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="32" y1="56" x2="46" y2="56" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="32" y1="49" x2="32" y2="53" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

badges.title: Pentakill
badges.description: Solved 5 challenges without breaking a sweat. You're building serious momentum.

badges.title: Double Digits
badges.description: 10 challenges solved. You've entered the top percentile of active learners.

badges.title: Completionist
badges.description: Cleared every challenge on the platform. Nothing left to prove — you are the benchmark.

badges.title: Chain Connected
badges.description: Linked a MetaMask wallet to your account. You're officially on-chain and earning real tokens.
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="6" y="18" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.12"/><rect x="6" y="18" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/><line x1="17" y1="21" x2="17" y2="27" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/><rect x="36" y="18" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.12"/><rect x="36" y="18" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/><line x1="47" y1="21" x2="47" y2="27" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/><line x1="28" y1="24" x2="36" y2="24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><rect x="6" y="34" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.12"/><rect x="6" y="34" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/><line x1="17" y1="37" x2="17" y2="43" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/><rect x="36" y="34" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.12"/><rect x="36" y="34" width="22" height="12" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/><line x1="47" y1="37" x2="47" y2="43" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/><line x1="28" y1="40" x2="36" y2="40" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="17" y1="30" x2="17" y2="34" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="47" y1="30" x2="47" y2="34" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

badges.title: Century Club
badges.description: Earned 100 CLB tokens — your hard work is now permanently recorded on the blockchain.
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="18" width="30" height="30" rx="2" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/><rect x="10" y="18" width="30" height="30" rx="2"/><path d="M10 18l8-10h30l-8 10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.06"/><path d="M10 18l8-10h30l-8 10"/><path d="M40 18l8-10v30l-8 10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.06"/><path d="M40 18l8-10v30l-8 10"/><line x1="48" y1="38" x2="40" y2="48" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><text x="25" y="36" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" font-family="monospace">100</text><rect x="14" y="40" width="4" height="5" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="20" y="37" width="4" height="8" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="26" y="34" width="4" height="11" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/><rect x="32" y="31" width="4" height="14" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M52 44v-12" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M48 36l4-4 4 4" stroke-width="2.5"/><circle cx="52" cy="30" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

badges.title: Eco Warrior
badges.description: Submitted a weekly SDG task and contributed to real-world sustainability. Code meets planet.
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="32" cy="42" r="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/><circle cx="32" cy="42" r="15"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="38" rx="12" ry="3" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.25"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="46" rx="10" ry="2.5" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.25"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="42" rx="5" ry="14" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M23 37c2-1 5 0 7 1s4 0 6-2" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M26 47c3 1 6 0 9-1" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.35"/><path d="M32 27V10" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M32 16c-10-2-14-7-11-13 5 0 11 5 11 13z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M32 16c-4-1-7-3-8-6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M32 22c8-4 12-2 12 3-5 2-10 0-12-3z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.25" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M32 22c4-1 7-1 9 0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M26 57c-3 2-6 4-8 4" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M32 57v5" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M38 57c3 2 6 4 8 4" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M22 59c-1 1-2 2-4 2" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M42 59c1 1 2 2 4 2" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

badges.title: Community Voice
badges.description: Your submission earned 3+ net upvotes from peers. The community trusts your code.
badges.criteria: Get a submission community-approved (3+ net upvotes)
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="18" y="18" width="16" height="26" rx="8" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.15"/><rect x="18" y="18" width="16" height="26" rx="8"/><line x1="22" y1="24" x2="30" y2="24" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="22" y1="28" x2="30" y2="28" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="22" y1="32" x2="30" y2="32" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M14 36c0 8 6 12 12 12s12-4 12-12" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/><path d="M26 48v6" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M20 54h12" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M18 56h16" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M38 26c3 3 3 10 0 13" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M43 22c5 5 5 18 0 22" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M48 18c7 8 7 24 0 30" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M44 16l8-8" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M48 8h4v4" stroke-width="2.5"/><circle cx="54" cy="6" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="50" cy="4" r="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.5"/></svg>

badges.title: Speed Demon
badges.description: Solved a challenge in under 2 minutes clean. No hints, no copy-paste — pure instinct.
badges.criteria: Solve any challenge in under 2 minutes

badges.title: Hard Hitter
badges.description: Conquered a Hard difficulty challenge graded by Judge0. Only the brave attempt these.

badges.title: Scholar
badges.description: Reached Junior Programmer tier at 130 CLB. Your foundational skills are employer-verified.

badges.title: Legendary
badges.description: Reached Expert Engineer tier — the highest rank on the platform. You are the benchmark.
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M32 4L6 14v18c0 16 12 24 26 28 14-4 26-12 26-28V14L32 4z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/><path d="M32 4L6 14v18c0 16 12 24 26 28 14-4 26-12 26-28V14L32 4z" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M32 10L12 18v14c0 12 8 20 20 24 12-4 20-12 20-24V18L32 10z" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M22 20l2-5 3 3 3-4 2 4 3-4 3 3 2-2 2 5H22z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.5" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="22" y="20" width="20" height="3" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="27" cy="21" r="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7"/><circle cx="32" cy="21" r="1.2" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="37" cy="21" r="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M32 28l3 6 6.5 1-4.7 4.6 1.1 6.5L32 43l-5.9 3.1 1.1-6.5L22.5 35l6.5-1z" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="32" cy="37" r="10" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M16 36l1 2 2 .5-2 .5-1 2-1-2-2-.5 2-.5z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M48 36l1 2 2 .5-2 .5-1 2-1-2-2-.5 2-.5z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M26 52l6 6 6-6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/></svg>

badges.title: Night Owl
badges.description: Submitted a challenge solution between midnight and 5 AM. Dedication knows no bedtime.
badges.criteria: Complete a challenge between 12 AM and 5 AM
badges.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="26" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.08"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="26"/><path d="M32 18 L40 28 L32 38 L24 28 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M32 10 L42 25 L32 32 L22 25 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M32 38 L40 48 L32 55 L24 48 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.25" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="32" cy="28" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="32" cy="48" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M28 32 L36 32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.3"/></svg>

badges.title: Explorer
badges.description: Attempted challenges across 3+ different categories. Curiosity is your superpower.

badges.title: Streak Warrior

badges.title: All-Round Master
badges.description: Solved challenges at Easy, Medium, and Hard levels. You're well-rounded.
badges.criteria: Complete 1 Easy, 1 Medium, and 1 Hard challenge

badges.title: Mentor Spirit
badges.description: Voted to help validate another student's work. Leadership through support.

badges.title: Early Bird
badges.description: Completed a challenge within 24 hours of account creation. No time to waste!

badges.title: Triple Threat
badges.description: Completed 3 challenges in a single day. A true coding marathon.

badges.title: CLB Hoarder
